description_long: This humanoid robot features a skeletal, mechanical frame with exposed joints and components, giving it an industrial and utilitarian appearance. Its head is equipped with two prominent cylindrical antennae or rods extending upward, and two round, eye-like structures that suggest visual sensors. The arms are long and segmented, ending in articulated hands with multiple fingers, while the legs are similarly jointed and terminate in broad, flat feet for stability. The torso is composed of interconnected mechanical parts, with visible gears and linkages that imply a high degree of articulation. The overall design is minimalist, with no external coverings or panels, emphasizing the robot's internal structure and mechanical function. The metallic finish throughout the body gives it a uniform, dark gray coloration.
description: A skeletal, industrial humanoid robot with exposed joints, cylindrical antennae, and articulated limbs, finished in dark gray metal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robot's symmetrical frame, extended arms, dual antennae, and round eye-like sensors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile, protruding head components, and the layered structure of the torso and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, antennae, and the mechanical structure of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the head, torso, and the articulated joints of the limbs.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and slightly apart, head facing forward, and torso upright.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, with only integrated mechanical panels and exposed structural components visible.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of two round, protruding eye-like sensors and a mechanical jaw structure; no mouth, nose, or expressive elements are present.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible hinge and rotary joints, allowing for a wide range of motion; hands have articulated fingers, and feet are broad and flat for stability.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Two round, eye-like sensors on the head, likely functioning as cameras or visual sensors; no other sensors visible.
